hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); SID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty'); PDIR="$HOME/.claude/projects/$(pwd | sed 's|/|-|g')"; PREV=$(ls -t "$PDIR"/*.jsonl 2>/dev/null | grep -v "$SID" | head -n 1); if [ -n "$PREV" ]; then jq -nc --arg p "$PREV" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:("Previous session transcript: " + $p + "\nBefore replying to the user, tail this JSONL transcript and identify: (1) any task that was started but not finished — treat those as the leading priorities for this session; (2) recent decisions, current branch state, and planned next steps — so you can avoid redundant questions or re-explanations. Briefly acknowledge the carryover at the top of your first reply.")}}'; else jq -nc '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:"No previous session transcript found for this project. Treat this as a fresh start."}}'; fi
